name: Denver Sprinkler LLM

AWS_ACCESS_KEY_ID.description: AWS access key for Terraform and S3

AWS_SECRET_ACCESS_KEY.description: AWS secret key for Terraform and S3

GH_TOKEN.description: GitHub PAT (fine-grained, scoped to peakweb-team org) for gh CLI — enables autonomous PR creation, issue comments, and branch pushes

postCreateCommand: gh auth status 2>/dev/null || echo '⚠️  Run: gh auth login (or set GH_TOKEN env var)' && echo '✅ Container ready. Run: claude --dangerously-skip-permissions'
